name: Turtle Bay Resort Pool & Beach
tagline: Day passes let you use the resort pool with waterslide, plus walk to calm Kuilima Cove for baby turtles.
hours: Pool open 8am–8pm daily; day passes available based on capacity
bestTime: Weekday mornings for pool space; late afternoon for turtle sightings at the cove
kamaaina: Kamaaina day rates available — call ahead for current pricing and availability
talkStory: Great for all ages. The pool has a waterslide and shallow kids area. But the real gem is Kuilima Cove — a sheltered bay where green sea turtles hang out regularly and the water is calm enough for toddlers. Bring your own snorkel gear for the older kids. Day passes include pool, beach access, and beach equipment. Reserve ahead on weekends — they cap the number. Worth the drive up to the North Shore.
